auth.name: Full name
auth.oauthFailed: Sign-in with the provider failed. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code
auth.resetPasswordDesc: Enter the code sent to your email and your new password
auth.passwordDisabled: Password sign-in is disabled. Please use an OAuth provider below or contact the admin.

tokens.title: Personal Access Tokens
tokens.description: Tokens for API access in place of session cookies. Send as `Authorization: Bearer pat_…` on each request.
tokens.createDesc: Pick a name + expiry. The raw token is shown ONCE after creation — copy it immediately.
tokens.createdDesc: Save this string now. After you close this dialog you cannot view the token again.
tokens.copyWarning: This token will NOT be shown again after this dialog closes. Copy + store it now.
tokens.emptyDesc: Create a token to access the API without going through the browser sign-in.
tokens.revokeDesc: Token "{name}" will stop working immediately. Any script using it will be rejected.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts
connectedAccounts.description: Sign in faster by linking your Google or GitHub account. You can unlink any time as long as another sign-in method remains.
connectedAccounts.emptyDesc: Sign in with Google or GitHub once and we'll link the account here automatically.
connectedAccounts.unlinkDesc: Sign-in via {provider} will stop working until you link it again. We'll keep your password sign-in unchanged.

privacy.title: Privacy & data (GDPR)
privacy.description: Download all your data or schedule permanent account deletion.
privacy.exportDesc: JSON containing your profile, issues you reported/were assigned to, comments, worklogs, attachment metadata, starred, watching, preferences.
privacy.deleteDesc: Account is permanently deleted after {days} days. You can cancel within that window. After the deadline, all your data (issues, comments, ...) is cascade-deleted.
privacy.confirmDesc: After {days} days, every workspace you own, issue you created, comment, worklog, and attachment is permanently deleted with no recovery. You can cancel the request before the deadline.

stats.logsEmpty: No activity in the last 24 hours.

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage accounts, change roles, and remove users.

actions.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently remove {email} and any workspaces they own. This action cannot be undone.

users.empty: No users match the current filters.

bulkInvite.title: Bulk-invite users
bulkInvite.description: Paste or type a list of emails (separated by commas, whitespace, or newlines). The system sends an invitation email to new addresses — existing users are skipped.
bulkInvite.messagePlaceholder: A short note to include in the invitation email…

flags.title: Feature Flags
flags.description: Control feature access per role, email, workspace, or percentage rollout. Changes are cached 30 seconds then propagate to all clients.
flags.dialogDesc: Flags are evaluated server-side for each user on every call to /feature-flags/me.
flags.keyHint: lowercase letters, numbers, dots or underscores. Cannot be changed after create.
flags.formRolloutHint: Percentage of users who get this flag when no explicit rule matches. 0 = opt-in, 100 = everyone.
flags.deleteConfirm: Remove the flag "{key}"? This will disable it everywhere.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Daily activity across the whole app. Toggle series off/on, pick any trailing window.

metrics.title: Performance Metrics
metrics.description: Top routes by volume with latency percentiles and error rate.
metrics.slowestHint: Top 10 individual requests by duration. Click a row to open the full log.
metrics.errorTrendHint: Hourly count of server errors over the selected window.
metrics.empty: No request logs in this window.

workspaces.title: All Workspaces
workspaces.description: Cross-tenant list. Deleting a workspace cascades to its projects, issues, sprints, comments, and attachments.
workspaces.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete "{name}" and everything inside it. This action cannot be undone.
workspaces.empty: No workspaces match the current filters.

detail.notFoundDesc: It may have been deleted or you opened the wrong ID.

health.title: System health
health.description: Probes DB, mail, supabase, sentry plus process metrics. Auto-refreshes every 30s.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Revoke ALL sessions for {email}? They will be forced to sign in again on every device.

maintenance.title: Maintenance Mode
maintenance.description: When enabled, non-admin users are redirected to a maintenance page until you turn it off.
maintenance.messagePlaceholder: We'll be back at 21:00 UTC — thanks for your patience.
maintenance.allowedEmailsHint: Comma-separated. Listed users keep full access while maintenance is on. Admins always bypass.
maintenance.pageDefaultMessage: The app is temporarily unavailable for scheduled maintenance.

audit.title: Admin Audit Log
audit.description: Every role change, user delete, session revoke, flag change, and setting write lands here with actor + payload.
audit.exportHint: Download the filtered audit log as CSV
audit.empty: No audit entries match the current filters.

mail.title: Mail logs
mail.description: Every Resend send attempt: successes, failures, and the reason why.
mail.sendTestDesc: Send a quick test email to verify the Resend integration and FROM address.
mail.emptyDesc: Logs appear here as users sign up or use forgot-password.

userActivity.description: Aggregated from request logs — what users actually do in the app (admin traffic excluded).
userActivity.topUsersHint: Ranked by request volume over the selected window.
userActivity.topRoutesHint: Endpoints users call the most in the app.

siteNotices.title: Site Notices
siteNotices.description: Broadcast announcements and toggle full maintenance mode from one place.

meta.title: Site Notices
meta.desc: Admin site-wide announcements and maintenance mode

announcement.title: Announcement Banner
announcement.description: Shown across the app when enabled. Dismissal resets when you change the message.
announcement.messagePlaceholder: Scheduled maintenance at 21:00 UTC — expect a 10-minute window…
announcement.previewEmpty: Enable the banner and add a message to see a preview.

overview.title: Admin overview
overview.description: At-a-glance status of logs and application configuration.
overview.cardAppEmailDesc: FROM address used for outbound mail
overview.activeUsers24hDesc: Distinct users that hit the API in the last 24 hours.

meta.title: Admin Overview
meta.desc: Admin dashboard for configuration and monitoring

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.description: Configure branding, metadata, and the FROM email address.

emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.description: Override the subject and HTML body for system emails. Leave blank to use the built-in defaults.
emailTemplates.subject: Subject
emailTemplates.bodyPlaceholder: Compose the email body. Leave empty to fall back to the built-in template.
emailTemplates.fallbackHint: Empty = use the built-in default template.
emailTemplates.formatHint: Pretty-print the HTML so it's easier to read. Doesn't change how the email renders.
emailTemplates.editDesc: HTML on the left renders into the email on the right. Save to apply.
emailTemplates.editHint: Click Edit template to open a wider editor.
emailTemplates.usingDefault: Using built-in default — leave blank to keep it.
emailTemplates.sendTestHint: Renders the saved template against a sample OTP and dispatches it to the address above.

quotas.title: Tenant quotas
quotas.description: Cap project count, member count, and total storage per workspace. Set 0 = unlimited.
quotas.projectsHint: 0 = unlimited. Workspaces at the cap can't create new projects.
quotas.membersHint: 0 = unlimited. Applied on add — existing members aren't kicked.
quotas.storageHint: 0 = unlimited. Total attachment size per workspace.

authProviders.title: Auth providers
authProviders.description: Toggle individual providers on/off. Use to enforce SSO or temporarily disable OAuth during an incident.
authProviders.passwordHint: Classic password sign-in. Disable to force all users through OAuth.
authProviders.allDisabledWarning: ⚠️ Disabling all providers locks everyone out. At least one must stay enabled.

appInfo.name: App name
appInfo.uploadHint: PNG, JPG, WebP or SVG up to 2MB. Uploads via Supabase.
appInfo.descriptionPlaceholder: A short tagline shown on auth + OG meta

appEmail.emailHint: Outbound mail (OTP, password reset) will be sent from this address.
appEmail.description: Configure how the app sends email — via Resend or your own SMTP.
appEmail.providerResendHint: Uses the Resend API key from env. The FROM domain must be verified on Resend.
appEmail.providerSmtpHint: Send through your own SMTP (Gmail, Outlook, custom domain). Requires an app password, not your regular password.
appEmail.smtpHint: Mail server credentials. The password is stored in DB and never returned to the browser.
appEmail.secure: Secure (SSL/TLS — on for port 465, off for 587)
appEmail.passwordHint: For Gmail use an App Password (2FA → Security → App passwords). Leave blank to keep the existing password.
appEmail.configured: Mail configuration looks complete. Send a test email to verify.
appEmail.missingTitle: Missing config fields — outbound mail will fail:

meta.title: App Settings
meta.desc: Admin configuration for app info and email

logs.title: System Logs
logs.description: Request logs, admin audit logs, and user activity analytics in one place.
logs.empty: No logs match the current filters.

meta.title: Request Logs
meta.desc: Admin view for errors and traffic

webhookDeliveries.title: Webhook deliveries
webhookDeliveries.emptyDesc: When events fire and workspaces have webhooks subscribed, attempts will appear here.

throttle.title: Rate-limit overrides
throttle.description: Bypass or scale the default request limits for specific users / IPs. Effective within 30s.
throttle.addDesc: Create a rule for a specific user or IP.
throttle.multiplierHint: e.g. 10 → allow 10× the standard route limit
throttle.reasonPlaceholder: One-off bulk import, day X to Y…
throttle.deleteDesc: Remove the override for `{target}`? It will fall back to the default limit.
throttle.emptyDesc: Create one when you need to allow a user or IP to exceed the standard limit.

errors.mainHint: The UI crashed while rendering this page. The error has been reported.
errors.adminHint: An admin page failed to render. Try again or return to the home page.
errors.authHint: Could not render the sign-in / sign-up page. Please try again.
errors.chartFailed: Couldn't render this chart. The data may be incomplete.

myWork.title: My work
myWork.emptyHint: No open issues are assigned to you right now.

dashboard.overview: Here's an overview of your workspaces and recent activity.
dashboard.noWorkspacesDesc: Create your first workspace to get started

push.title: Browser push
push.descOff: Turn on to receive notifications even when this tab is closed (HTTPS required).
push.descOn: Push is enabled. Your browser will show alerts when new events fire.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Press ? anywhere to open this list

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.subtitle: Organize your team's projects in workspaces
workspace.noWorkspacesDesc: Create your first workspace to start collaborating
workspace.manageMembers: Manage who has access to this workspace
workspace.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? Deleting a workspace permanently removes all its projects.
workspace.existingAccountHint: User must have an existing account
workspace.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this workspace? They will lose access to all projects.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Forward issue + comment events to an external URL. Every request is signed with HMAC-SHA256 using the hook's secret.
webhooks.dialogDesc: URLs at `hooks.slack.com/...` are auto-formatted as Slack attachments.
webhooks.name: Name
webhooks.urlHint: Must be http or https. Receives POST with JSON + X-Webhook-Signature header.
webhooks.deleteDesc: Webhook "{name}" will be removed and stop receiving events.
webhooks.emptyDesc: Add a webhook to receive real-time events in Slack, Discord, or your internal services.

columns.title: Board columns (Workflow)
columns.description: Add/rename/delete Kanban columns. Each must belong to one of TODO, IN_PROGRESS, or DONE. At least one DONE column must always exist so closed issues have a home.
columns.addDesc: Pick a name + category. New issues land in the first TODO column.
columns.categoryHint: Category drives stats + filters. Changing it doesn't move existing issues.
columns.deleteDesc: Delete column "{name}". Issues in this column move to the first TODO column.
columns.emptyDesc: Create the first column to bootstrap the workflow.
columns.cannotDeleteLastDone: Can't delete the last DONE column. Create another DONE column first.

project.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to start tracking issues
project.noEligibleMembers: No workspace members left to add
project.readOnlyNotice: Only project LEAD/ADMIN (or workspace OWNER/ADMIN) can edit.
project.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member from the project?
project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This action cannot be undone.

board.noActiveSprintDesc: Start a sprint in the Backlog tab to view the board
board.velocityEmpty: No closed sprints yet — velocity will appear after the first sprint completes.
board.cfdDescription: Issue count by status across the last {days} days. A widening "In Progress" band signals the backlog is filling up.
board.cfdEmpty: Not enough data to draw a CFD yet.

issue.bulkDeleteConfirm: Delete {count} issue(s)? This cannot be undone.
issue.dropOrClick: Drop files here or click to browse

roadmap.emptyTitle: No epics to plot on the timeline
roadmap.emptyDesc: Create EPIC-type issues with a startDate or dueDate to see them here.

customFields.title: Custom fields
customFields.description: Define extra fields per issue in this project. Each renders on the issue detail sidebar.
customFields.name: Name
customFields.createDesc: Field appears on the issue sidebar immediately. SELECT/MULTI_SELECT need at least one option.
customFields.deleteDesc: Field "{name}" will be removed along with every saved issue value.
customFields.emptyDesc: Add fields (Team, Severity, ...) to capture extra info per issue.

pwa.installPrompt: Install the app for faster access

calendar.dragHint: Drag an issue to another day to reschedule

sprint.deleteSprintConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sprint? Issues will be moved to the backlog.
sprint.emptyHint: Drag issues here to plan this sprint

backlog.title: Backlog
backlog.empty: No issues in backlog. Create an issue without assigning a sprint.
backlog.exportCsvHint: Download all project issues as CSV

share.title: Share issue
share.subtitle: Generate a read-only link to share this issue with people outside the workspace.

invite.title: Invite links
invite.subtitle: Generate links that let new people join the workspace with a preset role.
invite.confirmRevokeDesc: Anyone who hasn't joined yet will be blocked. People who already joined remain members.

notifPrefs.title: Notification preferences
notifPrefs.subtitle: Toggle each event per channel. Defaults: in-app on, email off.
notifPrefs.emailNote: Email digest runs via cron once Phase 1.6 ships.

templates.title: Issue templates
templates.subtitle: Standardize how the team files work — pick a template when creating an issue and have type, priority, labels, and description pre-filled.
templates.empty: No templates in this project yet.
templates.descriptionPlaceholder: Guidance on how to file this kind of issue...
templates.confirmDeleteDesc: It will disappear from the create-issue dropdown. Issues already created from it are unaffected.

messages.REGISTER_SUCCESS: Registration successful! Please check your email.
messages.FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: Reset code sent! Please check your email.
messages.RESET_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: Password reset successfully! Please sign in.
messages.IMAGE_TOO_LARGE: Image is larger than 2MB, please pick a smaller file.
messages.MAIL_TEST_SENT: Test email sent. Check the inbox to confirm the config.
messages.PUSH_SUBSCRIBED: Browser push enabled for this device.
messages.PUSH_PERMISSION_DENIED: Browser denied notification permission. Adjust site settings to re-enable.
messages.MAIL_RETRIED: Test email sent. Check the inbox to confirm the config.
messages.MAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED: Mail config is incomplete. Open Settings → App Email to fill in the missing fields.
messages.MAIL_SEND_FAILED: Failed to send email. Open System Logs → Email for details.
messages.FLAG_KEY_EXISTS: A flag with that key already exists.
messages.CANNOT_MODIFY_SELF: You cannot modify your own account here.
messages.ISSUE_LINK_SELF: An issue can't be linked to itself.
messages.OAUTH_LAST_LOGIN_METHOD: Cannot unlink — this is your only sign-in method. Set a password first.
messages.INVITE_LINK_EXHAUSTED: Invite link is out of uses.
messages.EMAIL_PENDING_VERIFICATION: This email is pending verification. Please check your inbox.
messages.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Your email has not been verified yet.
messages.REFRESH_TOKEN_INVALID: Session expired. Please sign in again.
messages.REFRESH_TOKEN_NOT_FOUND: Session not found. Please sign in again.
messages.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
messages.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: You're going too fast — please wait a moment and retry.

validation.PASSWORD_MIN: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.PASSWORD_FORMAT: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, number and special character

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account, security, notifications, and privacy settings.
profile.avatarHint: Click the avatar to change it (JPG/PNG/GIF/WEBP, up to 2MB).

sessions.title: Signed-in devices
sessions.description: Sessions currently active on your account. Sign out any device that isn't yours.
sessions.signOutConfirm: Sign out this device? It will need to log in again.
sessions.signOutOthersConfirm: Sign out every other device and keep this one active?
sessions.signOutAllConfirm: This signs out every device including this one. You'll need to sign in again.
sessions.emptyDesc: Only the current session is active.

meta.signInDesc: Sign in to continue to your account
meta.dashboardDesc: Overview of your workspaces and activity
meta.workspaceDetailDesc: Projects and members in this workspace
meta.profileDesc: Manage your profile and account settings
